  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Which focus should I prioritize for this paragraph: (A) logical consistency and evidence–claim alignment, (B) sentence-level writing polish, or (C) citation/novelty checks?",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The paragraph advances a theoretical-to-empirical argument chain that should be checked for correct interpretation of the curvature-dependent guarantee and internal consistency.",
    "R1.3": "The reported empirical ratios should be assessed for whether they substantiate the stated theoretical narrative about curvature and greedy performance.",
    "R1.6": "Sentence-level clarity and precision in describing bounds, assumptions, and interpretations can materially improve reader comprehension.",
    "RX.1": "Any conclusions about bounds or empirical behavior should include appropriate caveats and limitations (e.g., estimator variance and dataset specificity).",
    "RX.2": "Claims about performance implications of curvature should be phrased conservatively to avoid overinterpreting theoretical bounds or limited experiments.",
    "RX.3": "Feedback will be constrained strictly to this paragraph’s content and claims without expanding scope to broader method redesign.",
    "RX.4": "Avoiding overstated conclusions helps prevent misleading practitioners or readers about expected system behavior.",
    "RX.5": "Comments should reference specific sentences and named results (e.g., Nemhauser et al., Conforti and Cornuéjols) to maintain traceability."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: Which focus should I prioritize for this paragraph: (A) logical consistency and evidence–claim alignment, (B) sentence-level writing polish, or (C) citation/novelty checks?

rationale.R1.2: The paragraph advances a theoretical-to-empirical argument chain that should be checked for correct interpretation of the curvature-dependent guarantee and internal consistency.
rationale.R1.3: The reported empirical ratios should be assessed for whether they substantiate the stated theoretical narrative about curvature and greedy performance.
rationale.R1.6: Sentence-level clarity and precision in describing bounds, assumptions, and interpretations can materially improve reader comprehension.
rationale.RX.1: Any conclusions about bounds or empirical behavior should include appropriate caveats and limitations (e.g., estimator variance and dataset specificity).
rationale.RX.2: Claims about performance implications of curvature should be phrased conservatively to avoid overinterpreting theoretical bounds or limited experiments.
rationale.RX.3: Feedback will be constrained strictly to this paragraph’s content and claims without expanding scope to broader method redesign.
rationale.RX.4: Avoiding overstated conclusions helps prevent misleading practitioners or readers about expected system behavior.
rationale.RX.5: Comments should reference specific sentences and named results (e.g., Nemhauser et al., Conforti and Cornuéjols) to maintain traceability.
